title: 阪神JFの後に・不屈たる様

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove fails to win the Hanshin Juvenile
Fillies. Her ambition undeterred, she vows to use
this loss as fuel for her next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days have passed since the race. The world
at large is abuzz with debate, wondering which
race Air Groove will run in next.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove wishes to become a shining beacon
that all Umamusume aspire toward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to achieve that, she firmly announces
that she will be running in the Tiara tour: the Oka
Sho, the Japanese Oaks, and the Shuka Sho.
